REFLECTIN_CHROMOPHORE.name: Reflectin A1 photonic protein
REFLECTIN_CHROMOPHORE.description: High-refractive-index protein forming Bragg reflectors. Contains tandem (GRY)n repeats with interspersed (GHY)n nodes. The aromatic residues (Tyr, Trp, Phe) provide the refractive index contrast essential for structural color.

RETINAL_CHROMOPHORE.name: 11-cis-retinal (opsin chromophore)
RETINAL_CHROMOPHORE.description: Light-sensitive chromophore for cephalopod opsin. Photoisomerization from 11-cis to all-trans triggers the G-protein cascade enabling polarization-sensitive vision.

ACETYLCHOLINE.name: Acetylcholine (nAChR neurotransmitter)
ACETYLCHOLINE.description: Fast excitatory neurotransmitter for chromatophore neuromuscular junction. Mediates millisecond-scale chromatophore expansion.

SILK_FIBROIN_HYDROGEL.name: Silk fibroin hydrogel matrix for organoid scaffold
SILK_FIBROIN_HYDROGEL.description: Biocompatible hydrogel matrix. G: A: S: V: = 43:30:12:11 ratio. Forms beta-sheet crystalline domains interspersed with amorphous regions for tunable stiffness.

CHANNELRHODOPSIN_2_RETINAL.name: Channelrhodopsin-2 + all-trans-retinal complex
CHANNELRHODOPSIN_2_RETINAL.description: Light-gated cation channel for optogenetic synaptic bridge. 470nm peak activation, 7-transmembrane rhodopsin fold with retinal Schiff base linkage to Lys296.

VEGF165_GLYCOSYLATED.name: VEGF-A 165 — vascular endothelial growth factor
VEGF165_GLYCOSYLATED.description: Heparin-binding angiogenic factor. Homodimeric cystine-knot growth factor. N-glycosylated at Asn75. Key regulator of organoid vascularization.

DOPACHROME_MELANIN.name: Dopachrome → melanin pigment pathway
DOPACHROME_MELANIN.description: Chromatophore pigment biosynthesis. Tyrosinase-catalyzed oxidation of tyrosine through DOPA and dopachrome to eumelanin (brown/black) or pheomelanin (red/yellow).
